_instructions: Edit quotes below (add/remove/reorder), then run: python3 generate_philosophy_card.py — rewrites philosophy_quotes.svg. Each quote's 'lines' is how it's manually wrapped for display; keep each line under ~55 characters so it doesn't overflow the card.
